title: Fig. 5 in A new plesiosaur from the Lower Jurassic of Portugal and the early radiation of Plesiosauroidea
author: Puértolas-Pascual, Eduardo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 5. Phylogenetic relationships of Plesiosauria by traditional search method in TNT, depicting the position of Plesiopharos moelensis gen. et sp. nov. (ML2302) based on the matrix of Madzia and Cau (2020). Strict consensus tree of 950 000 most parsimonious cladograms with 1971 evolutionary steps. Numbers of each node indicate the Bremer support and the bootstrap frequencies over 50%.
steps_raw: Fig. 5. Phylogenetic relationships of Plesiosauria by traditional search method in TNT, depicting the position of Plesiopharos moelensis gen. et sp. nov.
